tagline: North Georgia's Premier Luxury Pool Builder

hero.headline:
Your Dream Pool, Built to
Last Generations
hero.subheadline: North Georgia's most trusted custom pool builder since 2014. Christopher Harris and the Southern Regional Pools team design and build luxury concrete pools that transform your backyard into the outdoor retreat your family deserves.
checkmarks: Owner on every project start to finish

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Custom Pool Design & Build<br class="hidden md:block"> for North Georgia Homes
services.subtitle: From initial concept to finished masterpiece, we handle every phase of your pool project with the precision and personal attention that only an owner-operated builder can deliver.

cards.title: Custom Pool Design
cards.description: Personalized concrete pool designs tailored to your home, landscape, and lifestyle. We collaborate closely with you to create a one-of-a-kind pool that reflects your unique vision.

cards.title: Pool Construction
cards.description: Expert concrete pool construction using the highest quality materials and proven building techniques. Every pool we build is engineered to last decades in Georgia's climate.

cards.title: Pool Renovations
cards.description: Transform your outdated pool into a stunning backyard centerpiece. Replastering, retiling, modern water features, and complete structural updates that breathe new life into aging pools.

cards.title: Pool Service & Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive pool care including weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, equipment repairs, and winterization to keep your pool pristine and swim-ready all year long.

cards.title: Outdoor Living Spaces
cards.description: Complete outdoor living design including custom patios, decks, pergolas, and integrated landscape features that seamlessly complement your pool and elevate your entire backyard.

cards.title: Equipment & Upgrades
cards.description: Modern pool equipment installation including energy-efficient pumps, saltwater systems, LED lighting, and automation controls that make pool ownership effortless and cost-effective.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Pool

steps.title: Free Design Consultation
steps.description: Meet directly with Christopher Harris to discuss your vision, walk your property, and explore design possibilities. You will receive a detailed proposal with 3D renderings within one week.

steps.title: We Build Your Dream
steps.description: Our experienced crew breaks ground and builds your custom concrete pool with meticulous attention to detail. Chris is on-site throughout construction, keeping you informed at every milestone.

steps.title: Dive Into Your New Lifestyle
steps.description: Your stunning new pool is ready to enjoy. We walk you through everything, handle the initial maintenance, and remain available for ongoing service long after the project is complete.

about.label: Why North Georgia Trusts Us
about.headline: Owner-Built Pools With a Personal Touch
about.description: Founded in 2014 by Christopher Harris, Southern Regional Pools has earned its reputation as North Georgia's premier luxury pool builder through hands-on craftsmanship and genuine client relationships. Unlike large franchises, Chris is personally involved in every project from the first design sketch to the final walkthrough. We build in the most prestigious communities across Cherokee County and the surrounding areas, and our commitment to quality extends well beyond the day we hand you the keys to your new pool.

features.title: Direct Access to the Owner
features.description: Work directly with Christopher Harris from consultation through completion. No sales reps, no project managers, just the person who stakes his name on every pool.

features.title: Premium Materials Only
features.description: We use the highest quality concrete, tile, coping, and equipment available. Every material is selected for beauty, durability, and long-term performance in Georgia's climate.

features.title: Service Beyond Completion
features.description: Our relationship does not end when the pool is finished. We provide ongoing maintenance, warranty support, and expert advice for the entire life of your pool.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Hidden Costs.
pricing.subtitle: Every project includes a detailed, itemized proposal. You will know exactly what you are paying for before a single shovel hits the ground.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every pool we build is backed by our personal commitment to quality. If any aspect of your project does not meet our exacting standards, we will make it right at no additional cost. Christopher Harris personally signs off on every phase of construction because your satisfaction is not just a goal, it is the foundation of our reputation. That is the Southern Regional Pools promise.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom pool?
faqs.answer: Most custom concrete pool projects are completed within 8 to 12 weeks, depending on design complexity and permitting timelines. We provide a detailed construction schedule during your consultation so you know exactly what to expect at every stage.

faqs.question: Do you only build new pools or also renovate existing ones?
faqs.answer: We handle both. Whether you want a brand-new custom pool or need to modernize an existing one with updated finishes, new features, or structural repairs, we have the expertise to deliver outstanding results.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in North Georgia?
faqs.answer: We proudly serve Woodstock, Cherokee County, and surrounding communities throughout North Georgia. We have built pools in many of the area's most prestigious neighborhoods and are familiar with local permitting requirements.

faqs.question: Will I work directly with the owner?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Christopher Harris is personally involved in every project from the initial design consultation through final completion. You will always have direct communication with the person responsible for your pool.

faqs.question: Do you offer pool maintenance after construction?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide comprehensive pool service and maintenance including weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, equipment repairs, and seasonal care. Our relationship with you extends well beyond the day your pool is finished.

testimonials.name: Melody I.
testimonials.text: From day one, Chris always showed up when he said he would, always responded timely, and got back to me with any questions I had. The hot tub renovation was completed within the estimated time frame. Truly reliable and professional.

testimonials.name: James S.
testimonials.text: The work conducted for me was professional, competitively priced, and most importantly the knowledge and skill level was excellent. I have no reservations in recommending Southern Regional Pools for parts and service.

testimonials.name: Robert & Karen M.
testimonials.text: Chris designed and built the pool our family had been dreaming about for years. His attention to detail was incredible, and he kept us informed every step of the way. Our backyard is now the best spot in the neighborhood.

contact.subtitle: Schedule your free design consultation with Christopher Harris. No pressure, no obligations — just an honest conversation about transforming your backyard into something extraordinary.
